game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **SteamWorld Quest:** Players control a party of heroes in turn-based combat, managing a hand of 6-8 "punch-cards" drawn from a customizable deck of over 100 unique cards. During their turn, players tap to select up to 3 cards to play, consuming "Steam" energy points which regenerate by 1-2 points per turn, to attack enemies, defend, or apply status effects with specific numerical values (e.g., 15 physical damage, restore 10 HP). Progression involves earning experience points from victorious battles to level up heroes, increasing their base HP and attack, while collected gold allows for purchasing new cards or upgrading existing ones to enhance their effects (e.g., +5 damage, -1 Steam cost). Combat concludes when all enemy health pools are depleted, or all player heroes are defeated, with the primary objective being to advance through story chapters and unlock new heroes and powerful card combinations.
game_info.description: SteamWorld Quest is a turn-based card battle game where you command a party of heroes against enemy robots. Build your strategy by playing up to 3 cards per turn from your hand, spending Steam energy to unleash attacks, defenses, and special abilities. Defeat all enemies to win battles, earn gold and experience to level up your heroes, and unlock powerful new cards. Victory comes from smart deck building and tactical card play!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (←→): Navigate menu options and select cards in hand
Space: Confirm card selection / Play selected cards / Advance dialogue
Z: Cancel card selection / Go back
Shift: View deck/stats (hold)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to title screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test that validates core game mechanics including card selection, energy management, and combat resolution. Tests that the game can progress through a complete battle cycle.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Randomly select valid cards from hand, ensuring Steam energy constraints are respected. Play cards when available and advance through combat phases. Simple random strategy to test basic game flow.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Game should handle card selection, energy consumption, and combat phases without errors. Battle should progress to either win or lose state. All game phases should transition correctly.

TEST_1.expected: Game should handle card selection, energy consumption, and combat phases without errors. Battle should progress to either win or lose state. All game phases should transition correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal win strategy test that demonstrates the best path to victory. Tests intelligent card selection, energy optimization, and tactical combat decisions to efficiently defeat all enemies.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritize high-damage attack cards when enemies have low HP. Use defensive cards when player HP is low. Balance card selection to maximize damage output while managing Steam energy efficiently. Focus fire on one enemy at a time.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Should achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state by defeating all enemies. Strategy should demonstrate efficient resource management and tactical decision-making. Win should be achieved in reasonable number of turns.

TEST_2.expected: Should achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state by defeating all enemies. Strategy should demonstrate efficient resource management and tactical decision-making. Win should be achieved in reasonable number of turns.

TEST_3.test_description: Energy management test that validates Steam point regeneration, consumption, and card cost constraints. Ensures players cannot play cards without sufficient energy.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Attempt to play high-cost cards and verify energy depletion. Test that energy regenerates properly each turn. Validate that card selection is blocked when insufficient Steam is available.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Energy should regenerate correctly each turn. Card play should be restricted based on available Steam. Game should prevent invalid card combinations that exceed energy limits.
TEST_3.description: Energy management test that validates Steam point regeneration, consumption, and card cost constraints. Ensures players cannot play cards without sufficient energy.
TEST_3.strategy: Attempt to play high-cost cards and verify energy depletion. Test that energy regenerates properly each turn. Validate that card selection is blocked when insufficient Steam is available.
TEST_3.expected: Energy should regenerate correctly each turn. Card play should be restricted based on available Steam. Game should prevent invalid card combinations that exceed energy limits.
